title: 3級 模擬テスト3 会話文 1
prompt:
次の対話の（　　　）に入れるのに最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

B: (      ). It costs $117.

title: 3級 模擬テスト3 リスニング第1部 1
prompt:
対話を聞き、その最後の発言に対する応答として最も適切なものを一つ選びなさい。
[Mock 3-1]
audioText:
A: Did you enjoy the environmental projects in London, Nancy?
B: Yes, but it was a bit crowded. Over 117 people were there.
A: I see. Would you go there again?

title: 3級 模擬テスト3 読解 1
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is London planning to organize more events?
[Mock 3-1]
passage: Recently, environmental projects has become very popular in London. Since 2001, many residents gather on weekends. Nancy, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 117 more events related to environmental projects.
choices: Because they want to make money.
Because it helps build a strong community.
Because no one joined the events.
explanation: grade3-03-reading-01: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

[Mock 3-2]
passage: Recently, part-time jobs has become very popular in Kyoto. Since 2002, many residents gather on weekends. Grace, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 124 more events related to part-time jobs.

title: 3級 模擬テスト3 読解 9
prompt:
次の英文の内容に関して、質問に対する答えとして最も適切なものを1, 2, 3, 4の中から一つ選びなさい。

Question: Why is Chicago planning to organize more events?
[Mock 3-9]
passage: Recently, historical monuments has become very popular in Chicago. Since 2009, many residents gather on weekends. Rachel, the mayor, said that this activity helps build a strong community. In the future, the city plans to organize 173 more events related to historical monuments.
choices: Because it helps build a strong community.
Because no one joined the events.
Because they want to make money.
explanation: grade3-03-reading-09: 読解の問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 3級 模擬テスト3 Eメール 1
prompt:

[Mock 3-1]
choices: 与えられたテーマに沿った、適切な構成と内容の解答
文法やスペルミスが多数ある解答
単語数が不足している不十分な解答
テーマから外れた無関係な解答
explanation: grade3-03-writing_email-01: Eメールの問題です。文脈と設問条件に最も合う選択肢を選びます。

title: 3級 模擬テスト3 英作文 1
prompt:
